database.name: VIEW SVC_LINEAS_PEDIDO_V
database.view: SELECT co.c_order_id, co.ad_org_id, co.ad_client_id, co.documentno AS orden, co.dateordered, cb.name AS proveedor, col.m_product_id, mp.name AS producto, cu.name AS unidad_pedido, col.qtyordered, col.c_orderline_id, ao.name FROM c_order co JOIN c_orderline col ON col.c_order_id = co.c_order_id JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = col.m_product_id JOIN c_uom cu ON cu.c_uom_id = col.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner cb ON cb.c_bpartner_id = co.c_bpartner_id JOIN ad_org ao ON ao.ad_org_id = co.ad_org_id WHERE co.issotrx = 'N' AND co.docstatus = 'CO'
